name: Brak-Ghul
description: A legendary Dwarven Forge-Master. He can shape molten metal with his bare hands and commands the heat of the deep earth.
imagePrompt: Epic Norse Saga art style. An elderly Dwarf with a glowing orange beard made of embers. Wearing heavy smithing aprons and holding a massive glowing hammer. No text, no signature.
